title: SQL: select interval ... + date ...
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_date TEXT NOT NULL);
SELECT date(event_date, '+1 day') FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT date('2005-08-19', '+1 day') FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Adding interval to date in SQL query
